title: Ébolowa Heat Wave
lead: Ébolowa is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.89. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Ébolowa is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 12.6 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 59%, and wind speed is approximately 1.4 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The absence of Heating Degree Days (HDD) indicates that the city is not experiencing any cold stress, but the high CDD value is a major concern.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
